items.title: 分辨頂級沉香——產區、特色、味道
items.description: 不同產區的沉香，會因為樹種的不同和環境條件的差異，產生不一樣的香韻。即使相同樹種、同一個產區生產的沉香，也會因為結香條件的差異，譬如水質、染菌的菌種跟受傷的部位、生長時間的長遠，而出現千差萬別的香味。

items.title: Traditional Uses of Agarwood in Asian Medicine
items.description: Discover how agarwood has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine for its therapeutic properties and cultural significance.

items.title: Sustainable Agarwood Cultivation: A Growing Industry
items.description: How modern cultivation techniques are making agarwood production more sustainable while meeting global demand for this rare and valuable resource.
